name: @leanish/document-it
description: agent-document-it — scheduled docs-drift audit agent: checks each opted-in project's documentation against the actual code and proposes corrections. Built on @leanish/runtime.

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test
scripts.check:full: npm run check && npm run test:integration

dependencies-comment: The two AWS SDK clients back src/lambda.ts only (DynamoIdempotencyStore + S3Catalog take injected clients); the handler itself depends on @leanish/runtime alone.
